pages.text: $(o)"Let the earth exhale — it has held its breath too long."$()$(br2)The first Dominion Magus wrote these words while standing at the dead center of a depleted leyline.

pages.title: Effect
pages.text: Within $(l)20 blocks$():$(br)· Hostiles take $(l)15 magic damage$()$(br)· All entities are launched ~1.5 blocks upward$(br)· Current chunk mana $(l)+200$()$(br2)Cost: $(l)3000$() mana.

pages.title: Tactics
pages.text: Three-in-one: damage, scatter, refuel. The launch affects players too — mind cliffs.$(br2)Recommended: $(l)Tier 2 Wellspring$() or above.
